raw: Print from home pass. 50 % discount for up to 4 tickets. For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/ Select a date to visit Spectacle Island or Georges Island Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details Enter the library's unique code found printed on the pass in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply Complete your transaction & bring your phone or printed copy of your barcode to board the ferry Summer Schedule: June 20 – September 2, 2024 Boston to Spectacle Island: Monday through Friday Boston to Georges Island: Monday through Friday Hingham to Peddocks Island: Monday through Friday Fall Schedule: September 5 – September 22 Boston to Georges Island: Thursday through Sunday End of Season Schedule: September 27 – October 11 Boston to Georges Island: Friday through Sunday
